title: Cozy Corner Wide Bookcase Unit
summary: Two matching shelf towers joined side by side under one long top — build the same simple unit twice, then trim the pair as a single wide bookcase.
description:
This wide bookcase is really two identical narrow shelf units built independently, then screwed together and topped with one continuous board so the seam disappears under a shared 1x2 top trim. Building the pair as separate, simpler units first — rather than trying to assemble one wide case in one go — is what makes a piece this size manageable without extra hands.

The shelf-front trim is called out as 1x4 rather than the narrower 1x2 shown in some reference photos, specifically to close the gap between the shelf edge and a mattress pushed up against it — a detail worth keeping if this bookcase sits beside a bed, and one you can size down if it doesn't.

cutList.note: Two per unit, two units total.
Covers only the visible upper portion — the lower back isn't seen once the unit is in place.

steps.title: Build two shelf units
steps.body: You'll build two of these. Attach the shelf and the 2x4 base support to the sides using glue and 2" wood screws, predrilled and countersunk.

steps.title: Join the two units
steps.body: Attach the two shelf units together using 1-1/4" wood screws, predrilled and countersunk — at least two screws at the top, two above the shelf, two below the shelf, and two at the base.

steps.title: Add the trim
steps.body: Attach the top trim with 1-1/4" finish nails and glue. Attach the three vertical trim pieces the same way. Attach the shelf-front and base-front trim using the wider 1x4 stock — it closes the gap between the shelf edge and a mattress better than a narrower board would.

steps.title: Attach the backing
steps.body: Attach the plywood backing to the upper portion of the shelf unit with 1-1/4" finish nails — the lower portion doesn't need backing since it won't be visible once installed, which also saves material for another project.

steps.title: Attach the top and finish
steps.body: Attach the shared top across both units, sand every surface, and finish as desired.

images.alt: Wide bookcase unit made from two joined shelf towers, part of a twin bed collection
